package rulefixtures

// scenario for builder_or_buffer_recreated_per_iteration: strings.Builder, bytes.Buffer, or bytes.NewBuffer(...) constructions observed inside loops instead of being reset or reused.
// fixture polarity: positive; family: hot_path; severity: info.
type Rule345PositiveRecord struct {
	ID int
	Name string
	Values []string
}

func scenario345Positive(records []Rule345PositiveRecord) int {
	total := 0
	for _, record := range records {
		for _, value := range record.Values {
			total += len(value) + record.ID
		}
	}
	return total
}
